---
title: "Constantia Eleanor Wood"
---

## Constantia Eleanor Wood

**Dates:** (1851-1940)

### Description

bridesmaid to Jane Colborne.

### Biography

Daughter of Colonel, later Lieutenant-General, Robert Blucher Wood, she married (1875) Edmund Fane.

### Letters

- Letter from October 1, 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
